title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.070 - Confession of judgment entered, when
text:
511.070.  Confession of judgment entered, when. — A judgment by confession may be entered without action, either for money due or to become due, or to secure any person against contingent liability on behalf of the defendant, or both, in the manner herein prescribed.
(RSMo 1939 § 1259) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1093; 1919 § 1544; 1909 § 2113
